properties.name: sepay.api-key
properties.description: SePay API key for webhook authorization.

properties.name: sepay.secret-key
properties.description: SePay secret key for signing or IPN validation.

properties.name: sepay.payment-method
properties.description: SePay payment method value to send in hosted checkout.

properties.name: sepay.auto-confirm-on-return
properties.description: Auto confirm payment on return from SePay if status is not final.

properties.name: app.public-base-url
properties.description: Public base URL used for building SePay callback URLs.

properties.name: app.local-base-url
properties.description: Local base URL used for redirecting users back to the app.
